name: Icertis Contract Intelligence API
what_it_does: Icertis REST API for AI-powered contract lifecycle management (CLM) platform. Enables AI agents to create and manage contracts, trigger approval workflows, extract and query contract data, track obligations and renewals, and integrate contract information with ERP, CRM, and procurement systems. Icertis is the market leader in enterprise CLM serving Fortune 500 companies.
use_cases: Creating and managing contracts from legal operations automation agents
Extracting contract clauses and obligations from contract intelligence agents
Triggering contract approval workflows from procurement integration agents
Monitoring contract renewals and milestones from compliance management agents
not_for: Simple e-signature without full CLM requirements (use DocuSign)
Non-enterprise legal without structured contract workflows
best_when: A Fortune 500 legal, procurement, or finance team using Icertis wants AI agents to automate contract creation, extract obligations, track compliance, and integrate contract data with ERP and CRM systems.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Contracts are legally binding documents. Automated contract creation errors have legal and financial consequences. AI extraction accuracy must be validated for high-stakes contracts.

auth.notes: Icertis uses Azure AD-based OAuth 2.0 for authentication (built on Microsoft Azure). Scopes control access to specific contract data types. Enterprise customer credentials via Azure AD configuration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise CLM pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts; pricing by user count and contract volume
pricing.notes: India-founded, US-headquartered. Azure-native CLM. Used by Microsoft, Boeing, Airbus. Enterprise-only pricing. Developer portal available for customers.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise SLA rate limits; Azure infrastructure throttling applies

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Contracts are legally binding — automated creation requires human review for high-value contracts
No public MCP server — Azure AD-based OAuth2; requires Azure tenant configuration
Azure-native platform — Azure AD app registration required for each integration
India-founded with US HQ — EU data residency available on Azure European regions
Complex contract data model with templates, clauses, attributes, and approvals
AI extraction accuracy validation required — model confidence scores available but not infallible
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Legally binding contracts. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Azure AD OAuth2. Enterprise-only. EU data residency available on Azure EU regions.

security_score_components.security_notes: Legally binding contract data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Azure AD OAuth. Enterprise-only. EU residency on Azure EU.
